headline: Sea Drone рҹӣҘпёҸрҹӨ– Saves Apache Crew рҹ’Ҙрҹ‘ЁвҖҚвңҲпёҸ Near Hormuz рҹ’ҰрҹӣЎпёҸ
text: рҹӣҘпёҸрҹӨ– Sea DRONE рҹҰҫ SAVES рҹ’Ә two Apache CREW рҹӘӮрҹ‘ЁвҖҚвңҲпёҸ after CHOPPER рҹ’Ҙ went DOWN рҹ«  near STRAIT of HORMUZ рҹ—әпёҸрҹҢҠ! US officials рҹ‘Җ told CBS рҹ“ә it was the FIRST EVER drone rescue рҹҡҒрҹҶҳ in history рҹ“ң! The AH-64 Apache рҹҰ… crashed Monday near OMAN coast рҹҸқпёҸ while patrolling those spicy regional waters рҹҢ¶пёҸрҹ’Ұ! Two soldiers рҹӘ– were FISHed out рҹҗҹ in just TWO HOURS вҸ° and now theyвҖҷre STABLE like a rockstar on tour рҹҺёвң…! Rescue led by NAVAL FORCES CENTRAL COMMAND вҡ“ and the 82nd AIRBORNE рҹӘӮ with 5th FLEETвҖҷs TASK FORCE 59 рҹӣ°пёҸ backing them up like a hype squad! Task Force 59 just launched their NEW UNMANNED UNIT рҹҰҫ in 2024, teaming ROBOTS рҹӨ– with REAL operators рҹ‘©вҖҚвңҲпёҸ to BOLSTER security across the MIDDLE EAST рҹ”ҘрҹҢҚ! Drone looked like a SPEED BOAT рҹҸҺпёҸ on steroids, zipping across waves рҹҢҠрҹ’Ё to grab the crew! Trump рҹҚҠрҹ‘‘ said the soldiers are вҖҳFINEвҖҷ рҹҳҺ and a FULL REPORT рҹ“Ӣ is dropping later! Investigation ongoing рҹ•өпёҸвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ whether it was MECHANICAL FAIL рҹҳөвҖҚрҹ’« or something IRANIAN рҹ”Ҙ but no oneвҖҷs spilling the tea yet вҳ•! Sea drone did the HEAVY LIFTING рҹҸӢпёҸвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ and now everyoneвҖҷs like вҖҳDRONES FOR THE WINвҖҷ рҹҸҶрҹӨ–!
